# dott

CLI tool to check domain name availability. Direct WHOIS/RDAP lookups — no middlemen, no logging.

## commands

Check a name across all TLDs:
$ dott myname --plain

Check specific TLDs:
$ dott myname --tlds com,io,dev --plain

Suggest names from keywords:
$ dott --suggest keyword --plain

## output format

One domain per line: `<domain> <status>`

Status values: available, taken, protected, unknown

Example:
myname.com taken
myname.io available
myname.dev available
myname.co available

## notes

- Always use --plain for machine-readable output
- Use --tlds to narrow results and reduce output size
- Use --suggest when the user wants name ideas from a keyword
- protected = domain exists but is brand-protected
- unknown = could not determine (treat as inconclusive)
